form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track on March 19 over 1450m, 0.8 len behind Bjorn Ironside carrying 57kg at $2.40. The run before that 2nd of 12 at this track on February 19 over 1450m, 0.7 len behind Fostinovo carrying 60.5kg at $2.30. Placed four of last five including 3/3 this course and distance. Overdue and gets chance.

Baulked for a clear run from the 400m to the 200m.
Rolled in at the 250m, brushing Antonio Gaudi.

At the 1100m, the heels clipped by Monticello.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 58 day let-up. Last start 4th of 10 at Vaal on February 10 over 2400m, 4 len behind Copper Plate carrying 60kg at $5. Before that favourite; won by 1.0 len at Vaal January 17 over 2000m defeating Full Go with 56.5kg at $26. Placed o ly try course and distance. Capable of a strong showing.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of seven months. Finished off last preparation won by 1.4 len Vaal September 11 over 1600m defeating Guerilla Warfare carrying 60kg at $3.50. First up last campaign sixth of 13 at Turffontein Standside May 17 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Take No Prisoners carrying 60kg at $13.50. Was in great form winning two on end before a spell. Can go on with the job this prep.
